regions.text: In 1772 Joseph Priestley, the discoverer of oxygen, made a most important experiment. He knew that if you put a live mouse under a glass, it will die without oxygen.
Priestley put a green plant under a large glass cover standing in water so that no fresh air could get in. He thought he would find the plant dead like the mouse.
live: alive, living. mouse: small animal with a long tail. while: a space of time.
